description: Reorder and regroup the licaiclaw left navigation into fixed 工作台/市场/通用 sections, make the admin/control-plane data source authoritative, and apply the same configuration to the online database with persisted/runtime verification.

userStories.title: Define licaiclaw menu bindings as the source of truth in control-plane data
userStories.description: As a platform developer, I need the licaiclaw app menu bindings to encode the exact menu keys, sort order, and group labels so that the desktop left nav is driven by authoritative DB-backed config instead of ad hoc admin clicking.
acceptanceCriteria: Licaiclaw menu bindings include exactly these menu keys in order: chat, investment-experts, finance-skills, foundation-skills, cron, stock-market, fund-market, data-connections, im-bots, memory, security
Menu binding config stores group labels so the first five items map to `工作台`, the next two map to `市场`, and the last four map to `通用`
No extra licaiclaw app menu binding remains enabled outside the required ordered set
The source-of-truth config remains in control-plane DB/baseline-compatible data, not a frontend-only hardcoded reorder
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Add a deterministic script to upsert licaiclaw menu bindings
userStories.description: As an operator, I need a scriptable way to apply the licaiclaw menu assembly so that local and remote databases can be updated reproducibly without manual admin-web edits.
acceptanceCriteria: Add or extend a control-plane script that upserts app menu bindings for a specified app name
The script writes enabled state, sort order, and `group_label` for each required licaiclaw menu binding
The script can target the current environment database using existing env/config loading
The script can be re-run safely without creating duplicate bindings or unstable ordering
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Keep admin-web menu assembly view consistent with grouped menu bindings
userStories.description: As an admin user, I want the brand detail menu assembly panel to reflect the persisted grouped order so that the admin UI matches the control-plane source of truth after script-based updates.
acceptanceCriteria: Admin-web brand detail menu assembly reads and displays `group_label` from menu binding config
The licaiclaw menu assembly panel shows the updated grouped order without manual re-entry
Saving menu assembly from admin-web preserves the same group labels and ordering fields used by the script
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Apply the licaiclaw menu assembly to the local control-plane database
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the local control-plane database updated to the new licaiclaw menu grouping so that local runtime and admin verification use the same menu assembly as production.
acceptanceCriteria: Run the menu upsert script against the local/current control-plane database for `licaiclaw`
Persisted menu bindings for `licaiclaw` verify the exact order and groups in the database-backed admin API response
The local admin-web menu assembly page shows the same grouped order after reload
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Apply the licaiclaw menu assembly to the online database
userStories.description: As an operator, I need the online licaiclaw database records updated to the new menu grouping so that the production app uses the intended left navigation without manual admin operations.
acceptanceCriteria: Run the menu upsert script against the online target database for `licaiclaw`
The online persisted menu binding record verifies the required order and `group_label` values through the admin/control-plane API or direct DB-backed verification
The change is scoped to `licaiclaw` and does not reorder other apps' menu bindings
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Verify runtime and public payload expose the new grouped menu assembly
userStories.description: As a release owner, I need to verify the runtime/public payload after the DB update so that the desktop shell actually receives the grouped licaiclaw menu config, not just the saved admin record.
acceptanceCriteria: Fetch the licaiclaw runtime/public payload after save and confirm the menu order matches chat, investment-experts, finance-skills, foundation-skills, cron, stock-market, fund-market, data-connections, im-bots, memory, security
Runtime/public payload exposes group labels mapping to `工作台`, `市场`, and `通用` for the corresponding menu keys
Verification checks both persisted backend data and runtime/public payload before marking complete
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
